product_overview: A React + TypeScript front-end for browsing, searching and streaming aggregated anime content with OAuth authentication, favorites and watch-history backed by Supabase and HLS playback.
core_goals: Enable fast discovery and browsing of anime across categories (latest, TV series, movies, schedule).
Provide robust search and filtering to help users find specific anime.
Deliver reliable HLS-based playback with common player controls and episode navigation.
Support user accounts with OAuth, allowing favorites and watch history tracking.
Keep the app responsive and usable across devices with graceful error states for network/API failures.

features.name: Browse Anime Content
features.description: Browse anime collections across home, latest, TV series, movies and schedule pages and preview titles via quick view.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through anime rows -> Navigate to /latest -> Scroll through latest episodes -> Navigate to /tv-series -> Navigate to /anime/:id -> See anime synopsis and metadata
Navigate to / -> Hover on anime card for quick view -> See quick view modal with summary -> Navigate to /anime/:id from quick view -> See full details
Navigate to /movies -> Scroll through movie rows -> See loader while content loads -> See movie rows populated
Navigate to /schedule -> Scroll schedule list -> See schedule entries or see error message if feed fails to load

features.name: Search Anime
features.description: Search for anime using free-text queries and apply genre/type/year filters to narrow results.
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> Type search query -> Apply genre/type/year filters -> Submit search -> See search results -> Navigate to /anime/:id from a result
Navigate to /search -> Type uncommon search query -> Apply restrictive filters -> Submit search -> See no-results state with suggestions
Navigate to /search -> Type search query -> Submit search -> See network error message if API call fails

features.name: View Anime Details
features.description: View detailed information for a specific anime, including synopsis, characters and episode list, and start playback of episodes.
user_flows: Navigate to /anime/:id -> See anime synopsis and metadata -> Browse episodes list -> Select episode -> Navigate to /watch/:animeId/:ep
Navigate to /anime/:id -> Scroll to characters section -> See character list populated
Navigate to /anime/:id -> See episodes list fail to load -> See error message and retry option

features.name: Video Player
features.description: Stream episodes via an HLS player that supports play/pause, quality selection, seeking, fullscreen and episode navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to /watch/:animeId/:ep -> Player initializes HLS stream -> Play video -> Change video quality -> Seek video timeline -> Toggle fullscreen -> Navigate to next episode
Navigate to /watch/:animeId/:ep -> Player initializes HLS stream -> Pause video -> Resume playback -> See playback continue
Navigate to /watch/:animeId/:ep -> Player fails to retrieve stream -> See playback error message -> Retry loading stream -> Player loads stream successfully

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign in via OAuth providers to establish a user session for protected features like favorites and history.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Initiate login -> Redirect to OAuth provider -> Complete provider consent -> Return to /auth/callback -> Session established -> See authenticated session
Navigate to / -> Initiate login -> Redirect to OAuth provider -> Deny consent at provider -> Return to /auth/callback with error -> See authentication error
Navigate to /auth/callback -> See callback handling in progress -> See session created or see callback error message if network fails

features.name: Favorites Management
features.description: Authenticated users can add anime to favorites and manage a personalized favorites list.
user_flows: Authenticate and establish session -> Navigate to /favorites -> Add anime to favorites -> See item appear in favorites list -> Navigate to /anime/:id from favorites
Authenticate and establish session -> Navigate to /favorites -> Remove anime from favorites -> See item removed from favorites list
Navigate to /favorites -> Not authenticated -> See prompt to authenticate or be redirected to login

features.name: Watch History
features.description: Authenticated users can track viewing progress, resume episodes from the last watched position and view a continue-watching section.
user_flows: Authenticate and establish session -> Navigate to /history -> See continue watching section with progress per episode -> Select item to resume -> Navigate to /watch/:animeId/:ep and resume from last position
Authenticate and establish session -> Play episode -> Watch position is saved -> Navigate to /history -> See updated progress for that episode
Navigate to /history -> Not authenticated -> See prompt to authenticate or be redirected to login

routes.description: Home page with hero banner and anime rows
Anime details page with synopsis, characters, episodes
Video player page with HLS streaming

features.name: Browse Anime Content
features.description: Users can browse anime content by categories (latest, TV series, movies, schedule)
user_interactions: Navigate to different categories via navbar
Click on anime card to view details
Hover on anime card for quick view

features.name: Search Anime
features.description: Users can search for anime with filters
user_interactions: Type search query in search bar
Click on result to view details

features.name: View Anime Details
features.description: Users can view detailed anime information including synopsis, characters, and episodes

features.name: Video Player
features.description: Users can stream anime episodes with adaptive bitrate

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can sign in via OAuth (Google, GitHub)

features.name: Favorites Management
features.description: Authenticated users can save and manage favorite anime
user_interactions: Click heart icon to add/remove favorite

features.name: Watch History
features.description: Authenticated users can track their watch progress
